title: Average Daily Rate KPI for Hotels in Egypt
formula: ADR = Total Room Revenue / Number of Rooms Sold
description: The Average Daily Rate (ADR) is a key performance indicator used in the hotel industry to measure the average rental income per paid occupied room in a given time period. It is a critical metric for assessing the financial performance of a hotel. In the context of Egypt's hotel market, ADR helps in understanding the revenue-generating capability of the hotel and is essential for pricing strategies and revenue management. This KPI is particularly important for hotels in tourist-heavy regions like Cairo, Alexandria, and Sharm El-Sheikh, where pricing strategies can significantly impact overall profitability.
